buildCommand: npx prisma generate --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma && cd client && npx vite build && cd .. && node scripts/prerender.cjs
installCommand: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://browser.sentry-cdn.com https://js.sentry-cdn.com https://client.crisp.chat https://settings.crisp.chat https://js.stripe.com https://api.fontshare.com https://cdn.fontshare.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://api.anthropic.com https://api.stripe.com https://api.resend.com https://*.sentry.io https://www.google-analytics.com https://client.crisp.chat wss://client.relay.crisp.chat https://api.fontshare.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://api.fontshare.com https://cdn.fontshare.com https://client.crisp.chat; font-src 'self' data: https://api.fontshare.com https://cdn.fontshare.com https://client.crisp.chat; frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com https://game.crisp.chat; media-src 'self' https: blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://api.stripe.com; frame-ancestors 'self'
